title: BTS Receives 5 iHeartRadio Music Award Nominations for ARIRANG Era
detail: Post-ceremony coverage confirms BTS received 5 nominations at the 2026 iHeartRadio Music Awards, recognizing their ARIRANG comeback. The ceremony recognized their record-breaking re-entry with nominations spanning Best Music Video, Best Comeback, and social media fan-voted categories. US Army fan accounts track nomination tallies following the ceremony's broadcast.
